creator: cs@innolan.dk
text:
Created attachment 173419
New port

Connector/Net lets you easily develop .NET applications that require secure,
high-performance data connectivity with MySQL. It implements the required
ADO.NET interfaces and integrates into ADO.NET-aware tools.

Developers can build applications using their choice of .NET languages. 
Connector/Net is a fully managed ADO.NET driver written in 100% pure C#.
It does not use the MySQL C client library. 

WWW: https://dev.mysql.com/downloads/connector/net/


portlint -AC
    WARN: Makefile: possible use of absolute pathname "/p:Configuration=Rel...".

poudriere (10.3, amd64))
    No errors.


Comments:
Oracle does not publish the private assembly signing key which is needed to install the assembly into GAC. A key for FreeBSD is included in PATCHFILES. The key is in binary format.
